description: Slip your feet into cosy comfort and up your running speed with ease in this cotton socks from nike. Engineered with Dri-Fit technology, you are rest assured of comfortable and dry comfort.Made of Dri-Fit cotton for sweat-free comfortHas a supportive fit with arch compressingReinforced heel and toe for enhanced durabilityLeft and right specific design for a better fitCareMachine wash warm at 40 degreesUse a non-chlorine bleach if neededTumble dry lowDo not iron or dry clean
